MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Steven E. Littman represented Plaintiff Fred W. Taylor and Defendant, Sandra Oyen appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
